title: UK fish supplier to France, Spain and Switzerland plunges into liquidation – 30 years
description: The firm was founded by a fisherman in Lincolnshire three decades ago, selling fish, crustaceans and molluscs to retailers across Europe.

title: Plant 3 flowers in shady areas for beautiful results this May
description: If you have a shady area in your garden where nothing seems to grow, a gardening expert has shared three shade-loving plants that will thrive in even the darkest spots

title: Tata Curvv.ev SeriesX launched with 502 km range at Rs 16.99 lakh
description: Tata.ev has launched the Curvv.ev SeriesX in India at a starting price of Rs 16.99 lakh. The new variants bring a 55 kWh battery, 502 km certified range, more features and a 15-year lifetime HV battery warranty for the first owner.

title: Japan’s Sumitomo to divest stake in Madagascar nickel project
description: Sumitomo Corp plans to sell its majority stake in the Ambatovy nickel project in Madagascar following a review of market conditions. The Japanese trading house said it will divest its 54% interest in Ambatovy, one of the world’s largest nickel mining and refining enterprises, during the first half of the current fiscal year to March 2027. The operation has suffered a string of production issues, most recently a devastating cyclone in February.

title: USDA relocates and reorganizes nutrition programs for wider national reach
description: The US Department of Agriculture (USDA) Food, Nutrition, and Consumer Services mission area is introducing the Food and Nutrition Program. The initiative will reorganize and relocate staff and program leadership from Washington, D.C., to locations throughout the country. By relocating its programs, the USDA intends to realign its focus directly to the states that administer the department’s nutrition programs, the taxpayers who fund them, and the households that benefit from them. Moving from regional offices to spread-out Hubs seeks to improve program support across the US.

title: Estonian Defense Forces exercise Spring Storm 2026 begins
description: Large-scale military exercise Spring Storm 2026 started on Monday for the 20th time and will take place throughout the month. At its peak, it will involve over 12,000 soldiers from Estonia and allied nations.

title: Afghanistan delivers new residential houses to returning families
description: KABUL: Afghan authorities have completed and handed over 108 newly built houses in western Farah province to refugee families who had recently returned to the country, providing critical shelter amid a massive wave of repatriation, the official Bakhtar News Agency reported on Sunday (May 3).
